name: LegacyXChange, Inc.
summary: LegacyXChange, Inc. does not have significant operations. Previously, it was engaged in operating an online e-commerce platform for delivering various sports and entertainment related products that can be won in an action-packed environment of a live auction. The company was formerly known as True 2 Beauty, Inc. and changed its name to LegacyXChange, Inc. in July 2015. LegacyXChange, Inc. was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Boca Raton, Florida.
